description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:latest Docker image and defines a REPO_NAME variable set to gitlab.com/waringer/Alexa-Wetterochs. Include a global before_script that creates the GOPATH source directory for $REPO_NAME, symlinks the project into $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME, changes to that directory, and runs go get -u -d for gitlab.com/waringer/go-alexa/skillserver, github.com/codegangsta/negroni, and github.com/mmcdole/gofeed. In the test stage add a format job that executes go fmt $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/), go vet $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/), and go test -race $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/). In the build stage add a compile job that runs go build -race -ldflags "-extldflags '-static'" -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/mybinary, and publishes the resulting mybinary file as a build artifact. No special caches, rules, or deployment targets are defined.
